content_blocks.text:
noxious reptiles. The camp or barrack containing horses
chariots and elephants is the place of Chapa (चाप) or the
Sagittarius. The home of Makara (सकर) or the Deer-
faced is a river or other water-abounding region.
The seat of Kumbha (कुम) or Aquarius is a water-pot
and the receptacles of vessels in a house. The resort of
Meena (मीन) or Pisces is a river, the sea and similar
collections of water.
NOTES.

These are useful in fixing the nature and the whereabouts of
absconded or missing persons, lost things, etc., and seem to have
been culled from the works of the Yavanas, from which the
following is extracted:-
आद्यः स्मृतो मेषसमानमूर्तिः कालस्य मूर्खा गदितः पुराणैः ।

verse_data.sanskrit_text: आद्यः स्मृतो मेषसमानमूर्तिः कालस्य मूर्खा गदितः पुराणैः ।

content_blocks.text: सोऽजाविका संचरकन्दराद्विस्तनाग्निधात्वाकररत्नभूमिः ॥
Aries is remembered as the first, having a form similar to the beginning of time, as stated in the Puranas. It is the land of goats, sheep, caves, breasts, fire, mines, and jewels.

verse_data.translation: Aries is remembered as the first, having a form similar to the beginning of time, as stated in the Puranas. It is the land of goats, sheep, caves, breasts, fire, mines, and jewels.

content_blocks.text: कृषाकृतिस्तु प्रथितो द्वितीयः सवक्त्रकण्ठायतनं विधातुः ।
वनादिसानुद्विपगोकुलानां कृषीवलानामधिवास भूमिः ॥
The second, Taurus, is known for its lean form, and is the abode of the creator (Brahma). It is the land of forests, hills, elephants, cows, and farmers.

verse_data.translation: The second, Taurus, is known for its lean form, and is the abode of the creator (Brahma). It is the land of forests, hills, elephants, cows, and farmers.

content_blocks.text: बीणागदाभृन्मिथुनं तृतीयः प्रजापतेः स्कन्धभुजांसदेशः ।
प्रनर्तको गायनशिल्पकती क्रीडारतिद्भूत विहार भूमिः ॥
The third, Gemini, is associated with the lute and mace, and the shoulders and arms of the creator. It is the land of dancers, singers, artists, and places of sport and entertainment.

verse_data.translation: The third, Gemini, is associated with the lute and mace, and the shoulders and arms of the creator. It is the land of dancers, singers, artists, and places of sport and entertainment.

content_blocks.text: कर्की कुलीराकृतिरम्बुसंस्थो वक्षः प्रदेशे विहितश्च धातुः

verse_data.sanskrit_text: कर्की कुलीराकृतिरम्बुसंस्थो वक्षः प्रदेशे विहितश्च धातुः

content_blocks.text: केदार वापपुिलिनानि तस्य देवाङ्गानारम्यविहार भूमिः ॥
Cancer, with the form of a crab, is situated in water, and is related to the chest and the element of metal. It is the land of fields, water bodies, and beautiful gardens for the gods to roam.

verse_data.translation: Cancer, with the form of a crab, is situated in water, and is related to the chest and the element of metal. It is the land of fields, water bodies, and beautiful gardens for the gods to roam.

content_blocks.text: सिंहस्तु शैले हृदयप्रदेश प्रजापतेः पञ्चममाहुरार्याः ।
तस्याटवीदुर्गगुहावनाद्रिव्याधावनी दुर्गवनप्रदेशाः ॥
Leo, the lion, is in the heart region, and is considered the fifth by the wise. It is the land of forests, forts, caves, mountains, hunting grounds, and difficult forest regions.

verse_data.translation: Leo, the lion, is in the heart region, and is considered the fifth by the wise. It is the land of forests, forts, caves, mountains, hunting grounds, and difficult forest regions.

content_blocks.text: प्रदीपिकां गृह्य करेण कन्या नौस्या जले षष्ठमिति श्रुवान्त ।

verse_data.sanskrit_text: प्रदीपिकां गृह्य करेण कन्या नौस्या जले षष्ठमिति श्रुवान्त ।

content_blocks.text: कालार्थधीरा जठरं विधातुः सशाहूला स्त्रीरतिशिल्पभुमिः ॥
Virgo, the maiden holding a lamp, is in the stomach region, and is considered the sixth. It is the land of time, intellect, and arts related to women and love.

verse_data.translation: Virgo, the maiden holding a lamp, is in the stomach region, and is considered the sixth. It is the land of time, intellect, and arts related to women and love.

content_blocks.text: वीथ्यां तुला पण्यधरो मनुष्यः स्थितः स नाभी कटिवस्तिदेशे ।

verse_data.sanskrit_text: वीथ्यां तुला पण्यधरो मनुष्यः स्थितः स नाभी कटिवस्तिदेशे ।

content_blocks.text: शुक्लार्थवीथ्यापणपट्टनाध्वसार्थाधिवासोनतसस्यभूमिः ॥
Libra, the balance, is in the navel and hip region. It is the land of marketplaces, roads, and fertile fields.

verse_data.translation: Libra, the balance, is in the navel and hip region. It is the land of marketplaces, roads, and fertile fields.

content_blocks.text: श्वभ्रोऽष्टमो वृश्चिकविग्रहस्तु प्रोक्तः प्रभोमैहूगुदप्रदेशे ।
गुहाबिलश्वनविषाश्मगुप्तिर्वल्मीककीटा जगराहि भूमिः ॥
Scorpio, the eighth, with the form of a scorpion, is said to be in the region of the private parts. It is the land of caves, holes, poison, stones, anthills, insects, and serpents.

verse_data.translation: Scorpio, the eighth, with the form of a scorpion, is said to be in the region of the private parts. It is the land of caves, holes, poison, stones, anthills, insects, and serpents.

content_blocks.text: धन्वी मनुष्यो हृयपश्चिमाद्धस्तमाहुरूरू भुवनप्रणेतुः ।
समस्थित न्यस्तसम स्तवाजिसुरास्नभृयज्ञरथाश्वभूमिः ॥
Sagittarius, the archer, is in the thigh region, and is considered the ninth. It is the land of horses, chariots, sacrifices, and armies.

verse_data.translation: Sagittarius, the archer, is in the thigh region, and is considered the ninth. It is the land of horses, chariots, sacrifices, and armies.

content_blocks.text: सृगाईपूर्व मकरोर्द्धगात्रो जानुप्रदेश तमुशान्त धातुः ।
Capricorn, with the forepart of a goat and the hindpart of a crocodile, is in the knee region.

verse_data.translation: Capricorn, with the forepart of a goat and the hindpart of a crocodile, is in the knee region.

प्रथमोऽध्यायः
7
noxious reptiles. The camp or barrack containing horses
chariots and elephants is the place of Chapa (चाप) or the
Sagittarius. The home of Makara (सकर) or the Deer-
faced is a river or other water-abounding region.
The seat of Kumbha (कुम) or Aquarius is a water-pot
and the receptacles of vessels in a house. The resort of
Meena (मीन) or Pisces is a river, the sea and similar
collections of water.
NOTES.
These are useful in fixing the nature and the whereabouts of
absconded or missing persons, lost things, etc., and seem to have
been culled from the works of the Yavanas, from which the
following is extracted:-
आद्यः स्मृतो मेषसमानमूर्तिः कालस्य मूर्खा गदितः पुराणैः ।
सोऽजाविका संचरकन्दराद्विस्तनाग्निधात्वाकररत्नभूमिः ॥
कृषाकृतिस्तु प्रथितो द्वितीयः सवक्त्रकण्ठायतनं विधातुः ।
वनादिसानुद्विपगोकुलानां कृषीवलानामधिवास भूमिः ॥
बीणागदाभृन्मिथुनं तृतीयः प्रजापतेः स्कन्धभुजांसदेशः ।
प्रनर्तको गायनशिल्पकती क्रीडारतिद्भूत विहार भूमिः ॥
कर्की कुलीराकृतिरम्बुसंस्थो वक्षः प्रदेशे विहितश्च धातुः
केदार वापपुिलिनानि तस्य देवाङ्गानारम्यविहार भूमिः ॥
सिंहस्तु शैले हृदयप्रदेश प्रजापतेः पञ्चममाहुरार्याः ।
तस्याटवीदुर्गगुहावनाद्रिव्याधावनी दुर्गवनप्रदेशाः ॥
प्रदीपिकां गृह्य करेण कन्या नौस्या जले षष्ठमिति श्रुवान्त ।
कालार्थधीरा जठरं विधातुः सशाहूला स्त्रीरतिशिल्पभुमिः ॥
वीथ्यां तुला पण्यधरो मनुष्यः स्थितः स नाभी कटिवस्तिदेशे ।
शुक्लार्थवीथ्यापणपट्टनाध्वसार्थाधिवासोनतसस्यभूमिः ॥
श्वभ्रोऽष्टमो वृश्चिकविग्रहस्तु प्रोक्तः प्रभोमैहूगुदप्रदेशे ।
गुहाबिलश्वनविषाश्मगुप्तिर्वल्मीककीटा जगराहि भूमिः ॥
धन्वी मनुष्यो हृयपश्चिमाद्धस्तमाहुरूरू भुवनप्रणेतुः ।
समस्थित न्यस्तसम स्तवाजिसुरास्नभृयज्ञरथाश्वभूमिः ॥
सृगाईपूर्व मकरोर्द्धगात्रो जानुप्रदेश तमुशान्त धातुः ।
